Instance Property# allMechanisms

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+visionOS 2.0+watchOS 11.0+

```
var allMechanisms: [LAEnvironment.Mechanism] { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/localauthentication/laenvironment/state-swift.class/allmechanisms#discussion)

Information about all authentication mechanisms.

This property aggregates @c biometry, @c userPassword, @c companions and any future authentication mechanisms.
